title: Good Boy Chewy Twisters With Real Chicken 90 g (Pack of 5)
description: Product Description Good Boy treats are the perfect rewards for your pet. If you're training your pooch you will need a delicious treat that he won't mind working hard for. Chewy Twisters wrapped with 100% chicken breast are an all natural treat for your dog, and they are naturally low in fat but highly palatable. They also satisfy your dog's natural chewing instinct and helps improve its overall dental health. Here at Armitage pet care we have a long history of producing Dog treats in the UK, we have rigorous control of raw materials to ensure all products are manufactured to the most stringent standards.
